text: I could recommend this course to everybody who is really dedicated in minimally invasive surgery.
You can learn a lot and you can take a lot of tips and tricks home.
You can probably use that in your own department for the future and especially for young surgeons.
I highly advise to attend this course whenever there is a possibility even to come back again.
Our course lasts for two weeks, and if you hear two weeks, it sounds like nothing.
In this course we have 25 surgeons from all over the world, from 18 countries.
Within two weeks they can observe every day in the operation room about 60 cases of uniportal valves mostly.
